properties.displayName: Block adding this firewall rule 0.0.0.0 - 255.255.255.255 on PostgreSQL Flexible server
properties.description: Ensure that no PostgreSQL Flexible servers have a firewall rule with StartIP of 0.0.0.0 and EndIP of 255.255.255.255
nonComplianceMessages: PostgreSQL Flexible server doesn't meet AA SCCF benchmark: Block adding this firewall rule 0.0.0.0 - 255.255.255.255 on PostgreSQL Flexible server. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
